name: Festive Cocktail Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 oz.) Chopped Chilies or Jalapenos
1 package (8 oz.) Frozen Chopped Spinach, thawed and squeezed dry
2 cups Monterey Jack Cheese, grated (about 8 oz.)
8 ounces Cream Cheese, sliced into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium skillet. Add onion and sauté until softened.
2. Add chopped tomatoes and chilies and cook for two minutes.
3. Transfer onion mixture to a large bowl and add spinach. Mix well.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except tortilla chips, and mix well. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Spoon into a pam-sprayed shallow baking dish. (Can be refrigerated for up to 2 days at this point. Return to room temperature before baking.)
6. Bake at 400°F until bubbly and lightly browned, about 30 minutes.
7. Serve hot with tortilla chips.
